# 🎓 Skills Directory

Multi-step workflows for complex admissions tasks. Each SKILL bundles templates, examples, and reference guides.

## Available SKILLs (5 Total)

| SKILL | Purpose | Workflow | Output |
|-------|---------|----------|--------|
| **SOP Generator** | Write 650-word SOPs for any school | 7 steps | SOP + /10 score |
| **Resume Optimizer** | Create 4 ATS-optimized resumes | Per-school generation + scoring | 4 resumes + comparison |
| **Interview Prep Sprint** | Admissions + visa interview prep | 2-part (3+3 hours) | Q&A + mock feedback |
| **Admissions Tracker** | Track all 4 school applications | Weekly check-ins + alerts | Progress summary |
| **Research Deep Dive** | In-depth program research | 5-step analysis | Program profile + talking points |

---

## 🚀 Quick Start

**Type `/` in Copilot chat to invoke any SKILL:**

```
/sop-generator           — Write an SOP for a specific school
/resume-optimizer        — Create ATS-optimized resume for school
/interview-prep-sprint   — Prep for admissions + visa interviews
/admissions-tracker      — Track all 4 school applications
/research-deep-dive      — Research a specific program
```

---

## 📁 Folder Structure

Each SKILL is organized as:
```
skill-name/
├── SKILL.md                # Main workflow (start here)
├── README.md               # Quick reference
├── templates/              # Reusable templates & checklists
├── examples/               # Completed examples
└── reference/              # Rubrics, guides, databases
```

---

## 📚 Bundled Assets per SKILL

- **templates/** — Checklists, templates, frameworks
- **examples/** — Completed outputs you can reference
- **reference/** — Rubrics, databases, guides

---

## 🔄 Progressive Enhancement

All SKILLs are designed to improve over 4 phases:
- **Phase 1** (Jun 2026) — Foundation (core functionality)
- **Phase 2** (Jul–Aug 2026) — Optimization (automation, integrations)
- **Phase 3** (Sep 2026) — Intelligence (data + scoring)
- **Phase 4** (Oct–Dec 2026) — Mastery (advanced features)

See [SKILLS-INDEX.md](./SKILLS-INDEX.md) for detailed roadmap.
